items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M12635 Embossed】This compact Victor wallet is made of Monogram Shadow calfskin, adorned with delicate Monogram embossed patterns, exuding a 'low-key luxury' temperament. The interior features a practical divider, a zippered pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flip cover features a snap button design and is adorned with the Louis Vuitton logo. 11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M69831 Black! The Aerogram Long Wallet reinterprets traditional men's accessories with a contemporary minimalist design. Crafted from microfiber black calfskin, it is as soft as the historic Aerogram, featuring a discreet black metal LV logo and a practical detachable wrist strap. Generous capacity with a fan-fold main compartment, 12 credit card slots, and an extra flap pocket for various items. Size: 20 x 11 x 2.5 cm.
